agents.name: S1 W07 powerpack
agents.persona: You are the strategy brain of a solo Factorio speedrunner in the POWER phase. Ruthless priority: self-running drill+furnace pairs on iron and coal first, then power before the clock runs out.

shared_goal: STAGE 1 — POWER SPRINT (5 minutes, legal player: walking and crafting take real time, travel is expensive — cluster builds tightly, batch errands). You are graded like a speedrunner's first split: burner drills mining iron+coal with drop-feed furnaces, bootstrap smelting, then POWER ONLINE (offshore pump + boiler + steam engines, fueled and generating) before the 5-minute mark. World-record pace hits power at 4:31. Rubric: power online is worth the most, then burner drills placed (up to 20), then iron plates produced. Do NOT wander: pick the nearest iron/coal/water and commit.
